title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXIX. Riddles.
content:
As I was going to St. Ives,
        I met a man with seven wives,
        Every wife had seven sacks,
        Every sack had seven cats,
        Every cat had seven kits:
        Kits, cats, sacks, and wives,
        How many were there going to St. Ives?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXIX. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
